archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Tactical Command Center variant)
design_philosophy: A high-end, enterprise-grade River Intelligence Platform. Follows the 'Tactical Minimalism' and 'Control Room' principles. The UI must feel like a precision instrument for disaster management and IoT fleet operations. Relies on data density, pure visibility, and stark contrast rather than decorative elements.

headings.usage: Used for page titles, widget titles, and major KPI numbers. Avoid Inter for headings.

body.usage: Used for standard text, descriptions, and UI controls.

data_mono.usage: CRITICAL for all telemetry data, ML operation metrics, log entries, and sensor coordinates.

colors.rules: Avoid purple and teal completely. Use Deep Obsidian/Slate as the primary anchor with Electric Blue and Warning Amber for triggers.

layout_and_grids.navigation: Collapsible Left-Side Navigation. Horizontal top-bars are insufficient for 13+ modules. Sidebar must be dense, scalable, and foldable to maximize GIS map real estate.
layout_and_grids.page_structure: Modified F-pattern. Top-left always contains the 'North Star Metric' (e.g., Global Fleet Health or Active Flood Risks).

grid_system.name: The Control Room Grid
grid_system.strategy: High density, gap-4 or gap-6. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 xl:grid-cols-6 or 12. Every pixel utilized.
grid_system.widgets: Flat solid surfaces. 1px subtle border (border-slate-800). Max 8px border-radius (rounded-md or rounded-lg). NO heavy drop shadows. Use 1px inner glow highlights or stroke.

surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Grid Borders / Technical Look. Widgets use flat backgrounds with crisp 1px borders. Subgrid alignment where necessary.
surface_strategies.live_map_overlay: Glassmorphism (Crystal variant) exclusively for floating panels over the GIS map (backdrop-blur-xl bg-slate-950/60 border-slate-800).
surface_strategies.interactive_elements: Neumorphism is BANNED. Use flat design with sharp contrast changes on hover.

components_and_libraries.framework: React.js with Tailwind CSS (.js/.jsx files only).
components_and_libraries.ui_library: Shadcn UI (Customized heavily for dark mode, borders, and spacing). Go cardless where possible, using section borders instead.
components_and_libraries.charts: recharts. Use Line, Bar, and Donut. Must use custom tooltips that match the dark theme.
components_and_libraries.maps: react-map-gl for the /live-map module. Requires dark map style.
components_and_libraries.tables: Dense, exact typography. Left-aligned data. JetBrains Mono for numerical columns (MAC addresses, telemetry data, lat/long).

media_assets.instructions: Main agent must use these exact URLs. Do NOT use placeholders.

images.description: Winding river aerial view (use as visual texture or placeholder for map backgrounds)
Industrial IoT sensor equipment closeup (use in /sensor/:id digital twin detail)

testing_and_accessibility.data_testid_rule: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Text must meet minimum 4.5:1 contrast. Use Text Shadow over GIS maps. Explicitly set hover text colors (e.g. hover:text-white).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard exclusively using .js/.jsx files.
Implement the Collapsible Left Sidebar for the 13 navigation routes.
Use 'The Control Room' grid configuration for all dashboard views. Utilize space efficiently.
In /overview, ensure KPIs use the fluid text scale and JetBrains Mono for numbers.
In /live-map, use floating glassmorphic panels over a dark-themed map component.
In /sensor/:id (Digital Twin), utilize the sensor_hardware image and rich telemetry charts.
Implement WebSocket mock states by showing a 'Live' pulsing indicator (Emerald green) in the top header.
Avoid Shadcn 'Card' wrappers if they add too much padding; use custom raw HTML/Tailwind to create denser grids.
Never use pure black (#000000) or teal (#1B93A4).
